'''√h-ch-s''' ('''kahachas''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:debadge|debadge]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-ch-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:debadge|debadge]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| √h-ch-s
|-
! Lemma
| kahachas
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || thihachas || jihachas || shihachas || kihachas
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || thuthuhachas || jujuhachas || shushuhachas || kukuhachas
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || thuhachas || juhachas || shuhachas || kuhachas
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || thuhachas || juhachas || shuhachas || kuhachas
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || thehachas || jehachas || shehachas || kehachas
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || thothohachas || jojohachas || shoshohachas || kokohachas
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || thohachas || johachas || shohachas || kohachas
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || thohachas || johachas || shohachas || kohachas
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || hachas || hachas || hachas || hachas
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || hachas || hachas || hachas || hachas
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || hachas || hachas || hachas || hachas
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || hachas || hachas || hachas || hachas
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || thæhachas || jæhachas || shæhachas || kæhachas
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || thathahachas || jajahachas || shashahachas || kakahachas
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || thahachas || jahachas || shahachas || kahachas
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || thahachas || jahachas || shahachas || kahachas
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || shahachas
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || goshahachas
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || gokishahachas
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || shahachasnü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || goshahachasnknü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || gokishahachasnü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || shahachasshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || goshahachasnkshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || gokishahachasshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || shahachasro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || goshahachasnkro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || gokishahachasro
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || shahachasmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || goshahachasnkmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || gokishahachasmu
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || shahachassher
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || goshahachasnksher
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || gokishahachassher
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || shahachasng
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || goshahachasnkng
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || gokishahachasng
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || shahachasya
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || goshahachasnkya
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || gokishahachasya
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || shahachasyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || goshahachasnkyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || gokishahachasyam
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || shahachasnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || goshahachasnknüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || gokishahachasnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || shahachasnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || goshahachasnknüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishahachasnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || shahachasnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || goshahachasnknümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || gokishahachasnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || shahachasshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || goshahachasnkshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || gokishahachasshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || shahachasshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || goshahachasnkshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishahachasshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || shahachasshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || goshahachasnkshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || gokishahachasshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || shahachasronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || goshahachasnkronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || gokishahachasronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || shahachasroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || goshahachasnkroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || gokishahachasroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || shahachasromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || goshahachasnkromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || gokishahachasromu
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || shahachasmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || goshahachasnkmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || gokishahachasmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || shahachasmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || goshahachasnkmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || gokishahachasmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || shahachasmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || goshahachasnkmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishahachasmuro
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|d176386}}
